maturity.hint: Electronic invoicing is not transmitting to the tax authority yet. It is optional and for demo only — your sales still complete normally.

list.title: Emitted documents
list.description: Reverse-chronological. Every document has a CUFE — DIAN's deterministic SHA-384 hash — that ties this row to the underlying sale, void, or return.
list.empty: No fiscal documents yet. When DIAN reporting is enabled for this tenant, completed sales will appear here.

xml.title: XML CFDI 4.0
xml.draftHint: Unsigned draft — the SAT digital seal and fiscal folio are added when it is issued.
xml.emptyState: This document has no XML attached. Documents emitted in test mode for Colombia do not include XML.
xml.xmlCopyError: Could not copy XML to clipboard

contingency.title: Documents awaiting DIAN acceptance
contingency.description: Contingency means the document is waiting for acceptance or needs a later retry.

reports.title: Reports
reports.empty: No fiscal reports are available yet.

wizard.title: DIAN setup wizard
wizard.description: The guided onboarding flow will capture the tenant tax ID, numbering resolution, and authorization credentials.
wizard.gated: Requires an active electronic invoicing provider contract before production activation.

settings.tabDescription: Country-specific fiscal configuration. The pack rendered below depends on this tenant's country code.

unsupported.title: Electronic invoicing is not available here yet
unsupported.description: There is no fiscal pack for {{country}} yet. You can keep selling normally — electronic invoicing for this country will arrive in a future release.

issueCodes.MISSING_RFC: RFC issuer is missing or invalid
issueCodes.MISSING_RESOLUTION: Fiscal regime is missing or not in catalog
issueCodes.MISSING_CERTIFICATE: Place of issuance is missing or not 5 digits
issueCodes.INVALID_ENVIRONMENT: Environment is not sandbox or production

fields.enabledHelp: When on, sales will emit a CFDI 4.0 once emission is available. Today this flag only gates the readiness probe.
fields.rfcHelp: 12 characters for legal entity (PM); 13 for individual (PF).

toast.saveError: Could not save Mexico fiscal settings

co.title: Colombia — DIAN
co.emptyDescription: You can keep selling without it. Set up DIAN whenever you are ready to issue electronic invoices — your store stays fully operational either way.

fields.enabledHelp: Optional. When on, completed sales will emit a DIAN electronic invoice once transmission is available. Today this captures your issuer config and gates the readiness reminder.
fields.nitHelp: 9 to 10 digits, with an optional verification digit.
fields.resolutionHelp: The resolution number that authorizes your invoice range.
fields.nitDvSuggest: Verification digit for {{nit}}: {{dv}}. Add it as {{nit}}-{{dv}}.
fields.nitDvMismatch: Wrong verification digit — the correct one is {{dv}}. The DIAN would reject this.

issueCodes.MISSING_RANGE: DIAN numbering range is missing or invalid

toast.saveError: Could not save Colombia fiscal settings

fields.enabledHelp: When on, completed sales emit unsigned DTE drafts when the company has an active CAF. Signing and SII submission arrive in a future release.
fields.rutHelp: Format: body-verifier digit (e.g. 12345678-K). Verifier is 0-9 or K.

toast.saveError: Could not save Chile fiscal settings

caf.title: Active CAF
caf.description: The SII authorizes invoice/receipt emission in folio ranges. Upload a CAF from the SII portal to start emitting DTEs.
caf.empty: No active CAF. Upload one from the SII portal (coming soon).
